query:
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM duplicate_contact_pairs GROUP BY status;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_contacts FROM contacts WHERE archived_at IS NULL;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2stQR1ySY2c4Vud.1719b3382959 --database RGtcxHR8RPxZsqyxZLCcuq --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM duplicate_contact_pairs GROUP BY status;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_contacts FROM contacts WHERE archived_at IS NULL;
